topIssues.title: Multipart upload surface
topIssues.detail: POST /api/reels accepts video/thumbnail payloads — must require authenticated admin on backend.

topIssues.title: Destructive media delete routes
topIssues.detail: DELETE /api/media/storage/{file} and /api/storage/file/{file} can remove assets permanently.

topIssues.title: 6 episodes missing assets
topIssues.detail: Asset coverage gaps suppress weighted readiness.

recommendations: Upload assets for E01 and E02 to raise readiness from 25% to 61%.
Critical: Require admin Bearer token and audit-log every delete; confirm CSRF-safe methods.
Critical: Gate cleanup behind admin role, dry-run preview, and two-step confirmation.
Critical: Prefer HttpOnly secure cookies or short-lived tokens with refresh rotation.
High: Enforce Bearer auth on all upload routes and validate MIME/size server-side.
